title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course taught by David J. Malan. It covers intellectual enterprises of computer science and programming, with a dedicated chapter on artificial intelligence. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This is the first chapter of CS50's introduction to artificial intelligence, presented by Brian Yu as part of Harvard University's introductory computer science course led by David J. Malan. The chapter, titled "Playing," sits within a curriculum that surveys the intellectual enterprises of computer science and programming. The material is distributed through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare.
